mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT s.stock_code AS stockCode, s.stock_name AS stockName, r.current_price AS currentPrice, r.change_rate AS changeRate, r.volume AS volume, NVL(r.current_price * r.volume, 0) AS tradingValue FROM stocks s JOIN stock_realtime_current r ON s.stock_code = r.stock_code
WHERE s.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.current_price DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

SELECT s.stock_code AS stockCode, s.stock_name AS stockName, r.current_price AS currentPrice, r.change_rate AS changeRate, r.volume AS volume, NVL(r.current_price * r.volume, 0) AS tradingValue FROM watchlist w
JOIN stocks s ON w.stock_code = s.stock_code
JOIN stock_realtime_current r ON s.stock_code = r.stock_code
WHERE w.user_no = #{userNo} AND s.status = 'ACTIVE'
ORDER BY s.stock_name

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT s.stock_code AS stockCode, s.stock_name AS stockName, r.current_price AS currentPrice, r.change_rate AS changeRate, r.volume AS volume, NVL(r.current_price * r.volume, 0) AS tradingValue FROM stocks s
JOIN stock_realtime_current r ON s.stock_code = r.stock_code
WHERE s.status = 'ACTIVE'
ORDER BY r.change_rate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

SELECT s.stock_code AS stockCode, s.stock_name AS stockName, r.current_price AS currentPrice, r.change_rate AS changeRate, r.volume AS volume, NVL(r.current_price * r.volume, 0) AS tradingValue FROM recent_view rv
JOIN stocks s ON rv.stock_code = s.stock_code
JOIN stock_realtime_current r ON s.stock_code = r.stock_code
WHERE rv.user_no = #{userNo} AND s.status = 'ACTIVE'
ORDER BY rv.viewed_at DESC
